task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Impress or a similar presentation application is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Access the directory containing the architectural photos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file picker, 'Photo Album' dialog, or file manager window is open, displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/architecture_photos/'.

task_completion.description: Insert the architectural photographs into the presentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Architectural photographs are visible on the presentation slides in the main workspace or slide thumbnails.

task_completion.description: Place each image on its own separate slide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slide thumbnails in the side pane show that individual images are placed on separate slides, rather than multiple images clustered on a single slide.

task_completion.description: Ensure the presentation has exactly 8 slides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slide pane on the left or the status bar at the bottom indicates there are exactly 8 slides in the presentation.

task_completion.description: Save the presentation to the specified path with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the path '/home/ga/Documents/presentations/' and filename 'architecture_lecture.pptx', or the application title bar shows 'architecture_lecture.pptx' after saving.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of a presentation software to create the slides.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Impress (or similar GUI), not terminal commands or python scripts generating the .pptx file.

integrity.description: The agent inserted actual images rather than placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The slides contain real architectural photographs, not empty image frames, text boxes, or generic icons.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the application's interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog is visible, or the user clicks through the file menu to save, rather than moving/renaming files via the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The presentation must contain exactly 8 slides, with each slide containing one of the 8 architectural photographs. The final file must be saved exactly as '/home/ga/Documents/presentations/architecture_lecture.pptx'.
